label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business or technology strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity or product long-term market success

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance comparison against peers or standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or sizing data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment by Aberdeen analysts

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison against industry standards or peer performance using TPC or equivalent

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and benchmark records

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; TPC-certified or vendor-verified data

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Reasonable basis but analyst judgment involved

label: Low Confidence
definition: Directional judgment with limited evidence

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources

label: Mature
definition: Technology widely deployed and stable

label: Emerging
definition: Technology gaining adoption but not yet dominant

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer actively developed or supported

label: Active
definition: Technology currently in active use

label: Legacy Supported
definition: Technology in extended support or niche legacy use
